text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 56 

GLAUCOMA_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the glaucoma indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Condition 
Warehouse (CCW) glaucoma indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had 
the condition. 

SHORT NAME: GLAUCMAE 

LONG NAME:
